title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Ustraa - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Ustraa - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Ustraa! We are hiring a Digital Marketing Manager for our Coimbatore team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Ustraa:
Ustraa is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ustraa!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
